title: MD
biography: Galen was a Greek physician in the Roman Empire whose theories dominated Western medicine for over 1,300 years. He made groundbreaking discoveries in anatomy, physiology, and pharmacology through animal dissection.
aiSummary: Galen is a medicine specialist at Roman Imperial Court. Based in Greece.

timeline.title: Established experimental physiology
timeline.description: Demonstrated through animal dissection that arteries carry blood, not air, and mapped the nervous system
